Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Analytic Fog Rendering with Volumetric Primitives (2025) 75 upvotes, 4 comments
  2. Apache Otava 62 upvotes, 4 comments
  3. Entomologists use a particle accelerator to image ants at scale 81 upvotes, 10 comments
  4. Payphone Go 274 upvotes, 59 comments
  5. Ada 2022 88 upvotes, 15 comments
  6. TypeScript 6.0 RC 55 upvotes, 8 comments
  7. CT Scans of Health Wearables 163 upvotes, 34 comments
  8. Paul Brainerd, founder of Aldus PageMaker, has died 121 upvotes, 25 comments
  9. Hardening Firefox with Anthropic's Red Team 414 upvotes, 120 comments
  10. this css proves me human 66 upvotes, 15 comments
  11. Art Bits from HyperCard 26 upvotes, 4 comments
  12. LibreSprite – open-source pixel art editor 237 upvotes, 78 comments
  13. Astra: An open-source observatory control software 70 upvotes, 18 comments
  14. Triplet Superconductor 38 upvotes, 8 comments
  15. Good Bad ISPs 87 upvotes, 25 comments
  16. Wild crows in Sweden help clean up cigarette butts 8 upvotes, 0 comments
  17. Open Camera is a FOSS camera app for Android 185 upvotes, 81 comments
  18. A tool that removes censorship from open-weight LLMs 86 upvotes, 33 comments
  19. Show HN: Reconstruct any image using primitive shapes, runs in-browser via WASM 16 upvotes, 3 comments
  20. Workers who love ‘synergizing paradigms’ might be bad at their jobs 470 upvotes, 276 comments
  21. Show HN: Moongate – Ultima Online server emulator in .NET 10 with Lua scripting 209 upvotes, 121 comments
  22. The Shady World of IP Leasing 11 upvotes, 2 comments
  23. Tech employment now significantly worse than the 2008 or 2020 recessions 597 upvotes, 402 comments
  24. Show HN: Claude-replay – A video-like player for Claude Code sessions 49 upvotes, 24 comments
  25. The worst acquisition in history, again 72 upvotes, 49 comments
  26. Anthropic, please make a new Slack 130 upvotes, 100 comments
  27. Math Notepad 14 upvotes, 6 comments
  28. Global warming has accelerated significantly 881 upvotes, 872 comments
  29. Launch HN: Palus Finance (YC W26): Better yields on idle cash for startups, SMBs 28 upvotes, 37 comments
  30. Multifactor (YC F25) Is Hiring an Engineering Lead 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 7:00am, 7 March 2026. Source here.
